item.title: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.3.17
item.description:
Product: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.3.17
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 20 May 2026 17:29:37 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: - Database management and Selects and Insert macros to PostgreSQL/timescaleDB.


Release Notes: [3.12.3]
#133: Change INSERTs to NOT query time column format
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.11
item.description:
Product: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.11
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 18 May 2026 14:14:31 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin, Jack Maier, Yun-Yi Pai

Description: Visualize data from database (postgres/timescale)

Release Notes: - build with pgsql/3.12.2.16 (timestamp fix)
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.10
item.description:
Product: Database Viewer v2026.5.18.10

Release Date: Mon, 18 May 2026 14:02:05 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin, Jack Maier, Yun-Yi Pai

Description: Visualize data from database (postgres/timescale)

Release Notes: - build with pgsql/3.12.2.16 (timestamp fix)

item.title: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.2.16
item.description:
Product: LV-Data-PGSQL v3.12.2.16
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 18 May 2026 13:32:48 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: - Database management and Selects and Insert macros to PostgreSQL/timescaleDB.


Release Notes: [3.12.2]
#132 Fix conversion postgres timestamp to labview timestamp
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.12.0.30
item.description:
Product: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.12.0.30
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 13 May 2026 15:54:09 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Monitor and Control application inheritng from Instrument Framework and SMO
- Log instrument status to the PGSQL database.
- UI and API for controlling magnet field, temperature, and rotator angle (PPMS2 only)

Release Notes: #36 Add support for WPQIC PPMS ('PPMS-W-1') (including support for Supporting DynaCool)
- fix issue with incorrectly reported public API list
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.4.0.74
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.4.0.74
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 07 May 2026 18:30:00 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: Issues:
#152: use of 1 device is now supported (eg 1 PXI card or 1 USB device)
#155: acquisiton without demodulation is now supported
#156: add API for simplified synchronous measurments
#157: better support for USB-4431 devices
#158: 'clear graph' option on waveform charts is better supported
#159: the number of input and output channels is better synchronized to the number of configured devices
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.4.0.73
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.4.0.73
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 07 May 2026 16:51:03 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: Issues:
#152: use of 1 device is now supported (eg 1 PXI card or 1 USB device)
#155: acquisiton without demodulation is now supported
#156: add API for simplified synchronous measurments
#157: better support for USB-4431 devices
#158: 'clear graph' option on waveform charts is better supported
#159: the number of input and output channels is better synchronized to the number of configured devices
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Transport v2.3.2.43
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.2.43
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 12 Mar 2026 00:09:34 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.3.2]
- #158 update Control Experiment.json to use URI for instrument address
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Transport v2.3.2.42
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.2.42
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Wed, 11 Mar 2026 14:18:22 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.3.2]
- #158 update Control Experiment.json to use URI for instrument address
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Instrument Framework v1.15.11.52
item.description:
Product: Instrument Framework v1.15.11.52
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 11 Mar 2026 11:57:00 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: An object-oriented framework based on JKI SMOs, developed by the LevyLab at the University of Pittsburgh.

An Instrument developed using this framework will have the access to the following capabilities:

- Framework for communicating with hardware (Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL))
- Periodically polls the instrument for its settings and logs them to a PGSQL database
- Defines an API to allow external programs to control compiled instances of the application and remotely across a network (Either NI's Simple Messaging Library (STM) (deprecated in v1.9) or cross-platform protocol ZMQ (preferred beginning with v1.9))
- Provide a user interface (optional but probably desirable).
- Methods for reading and writing configuration from disk.

Release Notes: [1.15.11]
- remove LogData private data, LogData deprecated methods from Instrument.lvclass, refactor process.vi
item.dc:creator: LevyLab
